questionHtml:
The graph shows the effect of increasing substrate concentration on the rate of an enzyme-catalysed reaction.

 

Which type of inhibition corresponds to the labelled curves?

meta.title: The graph shows the effect of increasing substrate concentration on the rate of an enzyme-catalysed reaction. Which type of inhibition corresponds to the labelled curves?
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.15. Competitive inhibition as a consequence of an inhibitor binding reversibly to an active site
